creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 153131
Patch to update textproc/libucl to 0.7.2

Hi,
I have a patch to update the FreeBSD port textproc/libucl, and will upload the Poudriere Build Log shortly. Keep in mind that the library versions have changed from libucl.so.5 and libucl.5.0.0 to libucl.so.4 and libucl.4.1.0.
Thanks,
Neel
